name: #412 · 3614b8afa7ebd344ff61f96a6df6aac89a03309e · Michał Kruk · fix(docs): replace deprecated --eval with eval-sci in source code, README, and docs

newTests.name:
Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI eval-sci mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > fill script actually changes input value (verified after eval)

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI eval-sci mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > script with assertValue runs in SCI eval
